medications.title: My Medications
medications.noMedicationsMessage: Tap + to add your first medication, or scan a pill bottle.
medications.instructionsPlaceholder: e.g. Take 1 tablet by mouth once daily
medications.confirmDeleteMessage: This will permanently remove {{name}} from your medication list.
medications.confirmDiscontinueMessage: {{name}} will be moved to your discontinued medications list.
medications.confirmPauseMessage: You can resume {{name}} at any time.
medications.noInteractions: No known interactions with your current medications.
medications.noInteractionsFound: No interactions found with your current medications.

interactions.contraindicatedWarning: Do not take these together. Contact your doctor now.
interactions.majorWarning: This combination requires medical review before use.
interactions.moderateWarning: These medications may interact. Ask your pharmacist about timing.
interactions.minorWarning: These medications are sometimes taken together. Ask your pharmacist if you have questions.
interactions.reviewWithDoctor: Review with your doctor or pharmacist before continuing.

onboarding.enterManuallySubtext: Type in the medication name and details
onboarding.step1Subtext: Track medications, check interactions, and keep your caregivers informed — all on your device.
onboarding.step2Subtext: Scan a pill bottle or enter your medication details manually.
onboarding.step3Subtext: We'll remind you when it's time, and let your caregiver know if you miss one.
onboarding.step4Subtext: Invite a family member or caregiver to stay updated on your medication adherence.

caregiving.headerSubtext: Manage your care team and monitor patients
caregiving.noCaregiversSubtext: Invite a family member or trusted person to help monitor your medications.
caregiving.noPatientsSubtext: You will appear here once a patient accepts your caregiver invite.
caregiving.noFeedEventsSubtext: Dose events from your patients will appear here.
caregiving.revokeMessage: This will remove {{name}}'s access to your medication data. They will no longer receive alerts.

roles.primaryDesc: Full visibility into your medications, schedule, and dose history. Can edit your medications and receive all alerts.
roles.observerDesc: View-only access to your medications and schedule. Receives missed dose and refill alerts.
roles.emergencyDesc: Receives emergency alerts only. No access to your medication data.

permissions.viewMedicationsDesc: See your current medication list and details.
permissions.viewScheduleDesc: See your daily and weekly dose schedule.
permissions.viewDoseHistoryDesc: See a history of doses taken, missed, and skipped.
permissions.receiveMissedDoseAlertsDesc: Receive a notification when you miss a scheduled dose.
permissions.receiveRefillAlertsDesc: Receive a notification when a refill is needed.
permissions.receiveEmergencyAlertsDesc: Receive an alert in a medical emergency.
permissions.editMedicationsDesc: Add, modify, or remove medications on your behalf.

caregiving.inviteSubtitle: Send an invite link to someone you trust to monitor your medications.
caregiving.inviteContactRequired: Please enter an email or phone number.
caregiving.inviteEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
caregiving.inviteSentSubtext: Share the link or code below with your caregiver.

emergency.headerSubtext: Show this card to first responders
emergency.medicationsNote: Medications are synced from your medication list
emergency.qrCodeAlt: QR code for first responder access — not yet generated
emergency.qrPlaceholder: QR Code will appear here once connected to your account (Sprint 2)
emergency.saveFailed: Failed to save emergency card. Please try again.

doctors.title: My Doctors
doctors.noDoctorsMessage: Tap + to add your first doctor.
doctors.name: Doctor's Name
doctors.confirmDeleteMessage: This will remove {{name}} from your doctor directory.
doctors.saveFailed: Failed to save doctor. Please try again.

subscription.paywallSubtitle: Manage medications confidently — for you and your family.
subscription.changePlanDescription: Upgrade or switch between Premium and Family
subscription.upgradePromptBody: Get unlimited medications, caregivers, full history, and cloud sync.
subscription.cancelInfo: To cancel your subscription, tap Manage Subscription above. Cancellations take effect at the end of your current billing period.
subscription.checkoutErrorMessage: We couldn't open the checkout page. Please try again.
subscription.restoreSuccessMessage: Your subscription status has been refreshed.
subscription.restoreErrorMessage: We couldn't restore your purchase. Please contact support.

free.name: Free
free.description: Core medication tracking for individual use.

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: Unlimited medications, caregivers, and full history.

family.name: Family
family.description: Everything in Premium plus multi-recipient care and doctor management.

banner.default: Unlock unlimited medications and caregiver links with Premium.
banner.medications: You have 10 medications — upgrade for unlimited.
banner.caregiving: Add unlimited caregivers with Premium or Family.

wellness.title: How Are You Doing?
wellness.subtitle: This week's wellness check-in — takes about 2 minutes.
wellness.phq2Context: Over the past 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by any of the following problems?
wellness.phq2Q1: Little interest or pleasure in doing things
wellness.sleepLabel: How has your sleep quality been this week?
wellness.stressLabel: How would you rate your stress level?
wellness.respiteLabel: Did you get any time for yourself this week? (respite time)
wellness.notesPlaceholder: How are you really doing? This stays private.
wellness.disclaimer: This tool is not a diagnostic instrument. It is provided to support your self-awareness and well-being. Please consult a qualified healthcare professional for any mental health concerns.

card.title: Caregiver Wellness
card.firstCheckInPrompt: Take 2 minutes to check in on yourself.
card.neverCheckedIn: You haven't checked in yet. Caregiving is hard — you matter too.
card.daysSince: It's been {{count}} days since your last check-in.
card.affirmation: Take a break. You matter too.
card.accessibilityLabel: Caregiver wellness — tap to complete your check-in

appointments.title: Appointments
appointments.noUpcomingMessage: Tap + to schedule your next appointment.
appointments.confirmCancelMessage: This appointment will be moved to your past appointments.
appointments.saveFailed: Failed to save appointment. Please try again.
